name: Stable-Baselines3 (SB3)

performance.notes: Training speed depends on environment; vectorized envs via VecEnv for parallelism

agent_readiness.notes: Reliable, clean implementations of deep RL algorithms on PyTorch. PPO, SAC, TD3, DDPG, DQN, A2C, HER. Works with Gymnasium environments. VecEnv for parallel environment rollouts. Custom policy networks. Callbacks system. TensorBoard logging. SB3-Contrib for extra algorithms. The go-to RL library for researchers wanting clean, well-tested implementations. Excellent documentation. Type-annotated PyTorch.

gotchas: Not designed for massive parallelism (use RLlib/Sample Factory for scale)
Continuous observation/action spaces only for some algorithms
Not optimized for maximum wall-clock training speed
best_when: Single-agent deep RL research and experimentation
Quick RL prototyping with reliable implementations
avoid_when: Massively parallel training (use RLlib or Sample Factory)
Maximum training speed (use highly optimized libraries)
summary: Stable-Baselines3 provides reliable, well-tested PyTorch implementations of deep RL algorithms (PPO, SAC, TD3, DQN, A2C). Clean API, excellent documentation, type annotations. Works with Gymnasium environments. VecEnv for parallel rollouts. The standard library for single-agent deep RL research. Best for clean baselines and experimentation — not for massively parallel training.
